description_long: This is a medium-sized, cylindrical plastic water bottle with a slightly faceted surface and a distinct, angular shoulder leading up to a short neck. The bottle is predominantly light blue, with a solid blue screw cap on top. The body is divided into three main segments by subtle horizontal indentations, giving it a structured appearance. The cap is flat and circular, contrasting in color with the rest of the bottle. There are no visible labels, logos, or branding elements on the exterior. The bottle appears to be opaque, with no visible indication of the liquid fill level inside.
description: A light blue, faceted plastic water bottle with a blue screw cap and segmented body, lacking any visible labels or branding.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bottle's faceted body, blue cap, and three distinct horizontal segments.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the same faceted structure and cap, with no additional features or labels visible.
description_view_2: Rear view is visually identical to the front, with the same segmented body and cap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view matches the other sides, showing the bottle's uniform design and lack of distinguishing marks.
attribute_cap_type: screw cap; flat, circular, blue, no visible ridges or tamper-evident features
attribute_transparency: opaque; no transparency or visible gradients
attribute_bottle_neck_design: Short, slightly tapered neck with a flat top; no visible threads or ridges; transitions sharply from the angular shoulder to the cap
